answer:
A time in my life when I was very busy was during my final year of college. This was in 2018. During that time, I was juggling multiple responsibilities and commitments.

Firstly, I had a full course load to complete for my major in computer science. The coursework was demanding, with programming assignments, projects, and exams that required a significant amount of time and effort.

In addition to my studies, I was also involved in various extracurricular activities. I was a member of the student council, where I had to attend regular meetings, organize events, and collaborate with other students on different initiatives. I was also part of a coding club, where we worked on coding competitions and participated in hackathons.

Furthermore, I had taken up a part-time job as a tutor to support myself financially. This meant dedicating several hours each week to help students with their coursework and assignments.

Managing my time effectively was crucial during this period. I created a detailed schedule and used productivity tools such as to-do lists and task managers to prioritize my tasks. I made sure to allocate specific time slots for studying, attending classes, working on projects, and fulfilling my extracurricular commitments.

To stay focused and avoid burnout, I also made sure to take short breaks and engage in activities that helped me relax and recharge. Regular exercise and spending time with friends and family were important for maintaining a healthy work-life balance.

Overall, it was a challenging but rewarding time in my life. Despite being busy, I was able to successfully manage my time and accomplish all my tasks while gaining valuable skills and experiences.
title:
Describe a time in your life when you were very busy.
When was this?
What all were you doing?
How did you manage your time?
